[//]: <> (Use any Markdown editor tool to update the content. Please refrain from using html snippets because that content will displayed inside 'code' tag. Reference: https://guides.github.com/features/mastering-markdown/)

**Guidelines**:
- Swagger UI does not allow to pass **`null`** or **`empty`** where any api is expecting some data e.g. body parameter in **POST** method. This can be overcome by simple passing empty object as **`{}`** . In cases of strings and numbers there is no alternative as empty values.
- **`NULL`** or **`null`** keyword in this document signifies **`null`** entity in programming languages, it does not represents literal **`"NULL"`** string.
- While passing string data type values to query parameters, there is no need to include quotes **`(")`**. In certain cases if body accepts only string param, quotes can be skipped.

get.summary: Retrieve the first 'interesting' child of the specified object.

parameters.name: designation
parameters.description: A fully assembled CNS name, such as: "System1.ViewName:RootName.FolderA.FolderB.FolderC.ObjectName" (Recommendation: Double UrlEncode parameter prior to making it to part of URI.)

parameters.name: generations
parameters.description:
Optional: number of generations to check for graphic elements. If not provided
a default value of 1 will be used.

parameters.name: searchOptions
parameters.description:
Optional: a bit-style enumeration that identifies the search options. Please
refer to the documentation for the graphics orchestrator for more information.
As of right now, the only option is '1' which indicates that the search is
to stop after the first graphic is found. If not provided the default value
of 0 (no options) will be used.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description:
Optional: type graphic types to search for. This is a bit-style enumeration; please
refer to the documentation for the graphics orchestrator for more information.
If not provided the default value of 3 (graphic + template) will be used.

200.description: the object has an interesting child

204.description: The object has no interesting child

post.summary:
Get Table data for specific table. Specify the columns for which data is needed.
If no column list is provided then data for all the columns will be retrieved.
Specify the filtering and sorting criteria which are to be applied to the data, in the available parameters.

parameters.name: columnList
parameters.description: Column list for which values needs to be retrieved. If passed NULL for either Parent/Child or both, then data for all the columns will be retrieved. { "Parent": [ "ParentColumn1", "ParentColumn2", "ParentColumn3" ], "Child": [ "ChildColumn1", "ChildColumn2", "ChildColumn3", "ChildColumn4" ] }

parameters.name: systemId
parameters.description: System number of project

parameters.name: tableName
parameters.description: Name of the Table

parameters.name: sortColumnData
nameFilter
parameters.description: JSON serialized string array of Name Filters ["filter1","filter2"]

parameters.name: conditionFilter
parameters.description: String for the Condition filter

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Time Filter: From Date in UTC Zulu format

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Time Filter: To Date in UTC Zulu format

parameters.name: isDefinedBySourceTimeFilter
parameters.description:
Used based on whether HistoryLogTable supports this parameter or not.
            If supported and received “true” for this parameter 
            then TimeFilter specified by user will be ignored 
            and instead TimeFilter defined by the source will be considered.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Current page number (default: 1)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Number of records per page

parameters.name: isChildDataRequired
parameters.description: TRUE - If supported by the Table, user is also interested in Child data

parameters.name: additionalInfo
parameters.description: Any other additional information e.g. Filter required by specific table

parameters.name: snapshotId
parameters.description:
SnapshotId to be provided by client. Provided Id can be used to cancel GetTableDataPageWise request.
            It will be useful to free server resources that are getting blocked because of GetTableDataPageWise request.

parameters.name: snapshotSize
parameters.description: Size of the snapshot to create the snapshot. -1 means whole data. value less than -1 or value = 0 are not allowed.

get.summary: Retrieve an image for a global text group entry
get.description:
Some notes:
<para>
1) The height and width are optional (the default size is 32x32).
The values can independently be provided and the one that is
not specified will be 32. So it is in your best interest to 
either accept both default values (32) or provide both values.
Note that: (a) values less than or equal to zero are considered invalid
and the call will be rejected, (b) size is irrelevant when
retrieving SVG (and will be ignored).
</para><para>
2) There are two image formats supported: SVG and PNG. The
desired format is specified as either "SVG" or "PNG" - but
consider that only one format may be available. In that case
include BOTH formats, comma separated - such as "SVG,PNG"
or "PNG,SVG". The service will attempt to provide the image
in the order defined in the string.
</para><para>
3) Images in the PNG format will be Base64 encoded.
</para><para>
4) Images in the SVG format will be raw XML.
</para><para>
5) Note that XAML files can contain multiple images and this API
supports it (the file is opened and searched for the specified
image). SVG files also support multiple images but this
feature is not supported - the entire SVG file is returned.
</para>

parameters.name: tableName
parameters.description:
One of the "well-known" text groups
("disciplines" / "subdisciplines" / "objecttypes" / "objectsubtypes"
/ "categories" ). Note that the text group name is case-insensitive.

parameters.name: entryId
parameters.description:
A signed 32 bit integer. Note that text groups hold unsigned
32 bit integers, so a conversion will be required - do not try
to pass in a negative number.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: Optional: The width in pixels. The default is 32.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: Optional: The height in pixels. The default is 32.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description:
Optional: The format of the returned graphic; see implementation
notes for details on the supported formats. This argument
defaults to "svg,png" (which will attempt to load SVG first
and if this cannot be done, will try PNG).

parent text group or the nested text group) it will be provided.
</para>

CurrentLangText.description:
content in user current language
Prio 1: If value is assigend to CurrentLangText then attribute  CommonText and MultiLangText will not be considered.
To assign value in CommonText and MultiLangText set Descriptor to null.
To be created node display name. Common descriptor will be applied in all languages.

CommonText.description:
Prio 1: If value is assigend to CommonText then attribute MultiLangText will not be considered.
To assign value in MultiLangText set CommonText to null.
To be created node display name. Common CommonText will be applied in all languages.

MultiLangText.description:
Prio 2: MultiLangText has lower priority to CommonText. It will not be considered if any value is assigned to attribute CommonText
Set CommonText to null to assign MultiLangText.
To be created node display name. Language specific text will be updated for the node.
